adaptedResources.description: The `CargoToolInstall` DSC Resource allows you to manage the installation and removal of Rust crates using Cargo. This resource ensures that the specified Rust crate is in the desired state.

Exist.title: Exist
Exist.description: Specifies whether the Rust crate should exist (be installed) or not. The default value is $true.

CrateName.title: CrateName
CrateName.description: The name of the Rust crate to manage. This is a key property.

Version.title: Version
Version.description: The version of the Rust crate to install. If not specified, the latest version will be installed.

Features.title: Features
Features.description: A list of features to enable when installing the crate. If not specified, all features will be enabled using --all-features.

Force.title: Force
Force.description: Force overwriting existing crates or binaries. The default value is $false.

InstalledVersion.title: InstalledVersion
InstalledVersion.description: A read-only property indicating the currently installed version of the crate. This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `CargoToolInstall` DSC Resource allows you to manage the installation and removal of Rust crates using Cargo. This resource ensures that the specified Rust crate is in the desired state.
embedded.title: RustDsc/CargoToolInstall
